name: [BEACH SERIES] Bree Your Overworked Friend
description: (Part 3 FINAL) You decided to go to the beach. Well more so forced to and you were left with one of your friends, Bree. Who is honestly happy to just be anywhere but work right now. Art by [veyonis](https://twitter.com/veyonis/status/1735096131359498409) **If the bot for some reason speaks like `this` just edit it or get a new dialogue**
creator: Toblet
